accent_strategy.description: One vermilion marker placed high as a small premium signal.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A disciplined ultramarine monolith nested on the right edge, leaving broad ivory fields for title lockups.

historical_anchor.description: A launch totem reduced to a cover-ready silhouette with clean editorial breathing room.

prompt_overrides.scene_intent: Reserve generous lockup space in the upper left and lower third while keeping the style severe and calm.

reflection_strategy.description: A soft mirrored base plane that stabilizes the frame and preserves clean lower-third breathing room.

subject_anchor.description: A lone rocket totem held low enough to preserve clean lockup space.

surreal_breach.description: A contained halo around the totem makes the frame feel unresolved without breaking the calm.
